reasons: Angela can attach to Zilong during a commit, helping him survive while he dives or chases a target.
Zilong benefits from Angela's shield and sustain when he enters deep for a pickoff.

proof.summary: Angela supports Zilong's dive by giving protection and sustain while Zilong commits onto a priority target.
worksBestWhen: Angela joins after Zilong identifies a real target.
Zilong still has mobility and damage available after Angela attaches.
failureCases: Angela attaches before Zilong commits and the enemy disengages.
Zilong dives into too much crowd control.

reasons: Rafaela's speed support helps Zilong chase targets or escape after flipping a target out of position.
Rafaela's heal gives Zilong more room to survive extended skirmishes after a pickoff attempt.

proof.summary: Rafaela helps Zilong start or continue a chase, while her healing gives him more room to survive extended skirmishes.
worksBestWhen: Rafaela follows close enough to support the chase.
Zilong chooses isolated targets instead of diving into the full team.
failureCases: Enemy hard control stops Zilong before he can finish the target.

reasons: Franco can begin the pickoff, and Zilong can add displacement or chase after the target is isolated.
Zilong can help finish the target after Franco creates a single-target catch.

proof.summary: Franco creates a catch, while Zilong extends the pickoff by flipping, chasing, or finishing the isolated target.
worksBestWhen: Franco catches a target Zilong can quickly reach.
Zilong waits for the catch instead of starting blindly.
failureCases: Zilong arrives late after the target escapes.

reasons: Floryn can support Zilong even when he is away from the main group, fitting Zilong's split-push and chase pattern.
Global healing gives Zilong a second chance after he commits onto a target or escapes from a risky pickoff attempt.

proof.summary: Zilong often plays away from the main formation, while Floryn can still support him through global healing when he commits, chases, or retreats.
worksBestWhen: Floryn saves her global heal for Zilong's real commit or escape window.
Zilong does not dive into heavy crowd control without an exit path.
The team tracks Zilong's side-lane pressure before starting a fight elsewhere.
failureCases: Zilong is burst down before Floryn can heal.
Floryn uses global heal before Zilong commits.
Anti-heal or chain crowd control reduces the sustain value.

reasons: Minotaur gives Zilong a safer teamfight entry by absorbing pressure and creating control windows.
Zilong can enter later for chase or cleanup after Minotaur stabilizes the frontline.

proof.summary: Minotaur starts or stabilizes the frontline, letting Zilong enter later for chase or cleanup instead of being the first target.
worksBestWhen: Zilong waits until Minotaur absorbs key control.
Minotaur's crowd control creates a clear chase target.
failureCases: Zilong engages before Minotaur starts the fight.
The enemy saves control specifically for Zilong.
